hero.headline: Reserve.
hero.description: A premium management ecosystem for 2B-INFOSYS. We turn resource chaos into a streamlined, automated workflow.

about.title: About the Project
about.subtitle: Designed for Efficiency, Built for Impact.
about.quote: As part of my PFE 2026, I developed reservi.tn to solve a real-world problem: the friction of shared infrastructure.
about.description: This project focuses on the digital transformation of 2B-INFOSYS, transitioning from manual scheduling to a high-performance automated system that tracks every hall, car, and screen in real-time.

mission.title: What We Do.
mission.subtitle: We provide the tools to manage your organization's physical assets through three core pillars.

step1.title: Conflict Resolution
step1.description: Our smart-engine analyzes every request. If a room or car is busy, we provide instant alternatives.

step2.title: Hierarchical Flows
step2.description: Not all requests are equal. We automate approvals based on the user's role and priority levels.

step3.title: Live Display Sync
step3.description: Connected to hallway screens, our system shows real-time occupancy and meeting schedules.

footer.description: Modernizing infrastructure management for 2B-INFOSYS. A Graduation Project (PFE) 2026.
footer.developedBy: DEVELOPED BY [Hafsi Mohamed Kacem / Essid Melek]
